data.description: Reports in Israel: 'The US sent two EA-37B electronic warfare aircraft to the Middle East. The planes took off from the US yesterday and made a stopover in the UK.'

data.title: Claigan Webinar - New EU MDR CMRs and Allergens - Preparing for 50 new in-scope substances by 2028
data.description: In Ottawa, a webinar by Claigan on April 8, 2026, will discuss a significant update regarding substances covered under the EU Medical Device Regulation (EU MDR). To ensure continued access to the EU market by 2028, device registrations need to consider forty (40) additional Carcinogens.

data.title: Quantix Debuts Platform Delivering Real-Time Visibility and Performance Intelligence for Chemical Supply Chains
data.description: A cutting-edge technology has been introduced, granting chemical manufacturers an unparalleled level of insight into the movement, safety, and operational proficiency of their shipments. Unveiled on March 31, 2026, in Houston, the Quantix Platform by Quantix is an innovative AI-driven solution specifically tailored to empower chemical manufacturers with comprehensive data. This advancement promises to revolutionize the industry by providing a level of transparency never seen before.

data.title: AccountTECH Builds on a Decade of "Security First" Design by Partnering with Workstreet for SOC 2 Type 2 Certification
data.description: In Boston on March 31, 2026, AccountTECH announced a decade-long commitment to prioritize security across their company policy, infrastructure, and architectural design. Having made significant strides in this area, they are now taking further steps to enhance their security measures.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: The Ademi Firm investigates whether McCormick & Company, Incorporated's Transaction with Unilever is Fair to Public Shareholders
data.description: A law firm based in Milwaukee, Ademi LLP, is currently looking into allegations against McCormick (MKC) regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations in its latest deal with Unilever. This investigation, announced on March 31, 2026, is focused on examining the transaction details. For more information on participating in the investigation and gaining further insights, individuals can access relevant resources online.

data.title: EMGS: Signed agreement for asset sale transaction
data.description: On March 9, 2026, Electromagnetic Geoservices ASA (EMGS) issued a stock exchange announcement regarding a non-binding term sheet for a transaction. The Transaction entails an undisclosed third-party acquiring EMGS' EM Business assets, including hardware, IPR, contracts, and all employees. This potential deal signifies a significant shift in EMGS's organizational structure and operations.
Amundi releases 2025 Universal Registration Document. 2021 total assets under management reach €1.75 trillion.

data.title: New Study Reveals the “Transactional Gap”: 1 in 4 QSR Guests Missing Human Connection in the Age of AI
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Intouch Insight Ltd. (TSXV: INX) (OTCQX: INXSF), a prominent player in customer experience management solutions, unveiled findings from its latest study. The 2026 On-Premises Study highlighted a concerning disparity between operational effectiveness and authentic hospitality within the quick-service restaurant (QSR) sector. The research indicates a growing reliance on AI and automation by brands to address staffing shortages, leading to the emergence of a "Transactional Gap." This gap signifies a shift towards enhanced technical capabilities but a simultaneous decrease in meaningful human engagement, posing a significant challenge for the industry.

data.title: Europe faces a growing chronic wound crisis - time to act is now
data.description: In a recent press release from Gothenburg, Sweden on March 31, 2026, Mölnlycke®, a prominent player in the MedTech sector, expressed its appreciation for the release of "Shaping the future of wound care in Europe," marking the inaugural collaborative industry white paper by the MedTech Europe Wound Care Sector Working Group. This comprehensive document sheds light on crucial aspects within the wound care sector and emphasizes the...

data.title: SoloPace Announces US Commercial Release of the SOLO PACE FUSION Temporary Pacing System Following FDA 510(k) Clearance
data.description: A new transitional pacing mechanism has been introduced with the aim of increasing patient safety, cutting down on expenses, and boosting effectiveness for transcatheter heart valve (THV) surgeries. In a recent press release dated March 31, 2026, Solo Pace Incorporated, a rising player in the field of medical technology, revealed the innovative system. This advance is projected to positively impact numerous key metrics, including enhancing patient wellbeing during THV procedures, trimming costs, and streamlining operations to improve overall efficiency in the medical setting. Such developments signify a significant stride forward for the medical community and patient care as a whole.

data.title: Sterling Engineering Acquires Absolute Machine Control Technologies, Inc. (AMCT)
data.description: Sterling Engineering has recently expanded its automation capabilities and enhanced its expertise in machine controls through an acquisition. The company announced on March 31, 2026, in Westchester, Illinois, that it has acquired Absolute Machine Control Technologies, Inc. (AMCT), located in Rockford, Illinois. This move is expected to significantly strengthen Sterling's position in the market and offer a wider range of services. The acquisition represents a pivotal moment for Sterling, as it aligns with the company's growth strategy.

data.title: Coppermine and Orlegi Sports Launch a Global Pathway for the Next Generation of Soccer Players
data.description: In Baltimore, Orlegi Sports, a prominent sports management group owning three soccer teams, has partnered with Coppermine, Maryland's top youth sports destination. The joint venture, "Coppermine Soccer, Powered by Orlegi Sports," aims to enhance youth soccer access and development. This collaboration combines Orlegi Sports' strategies, expertise, and operational insights with Coppermine's diverse youth soccer programs. This partnership seeks to expand opportunities for young players, leveraging Coppermine's robust network to promote the sport's growth and development in the region.

data.title: Grand View Research Launches Advanced U.S. Healthcare Facility Mapping & Intelligence Platform to Enable Data-Driven Decision Making Across the Healthcare Ecosystem
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in San Francisco, Grand View Research (GVR) revealed the enhancement of its U.S. Healthcare Facility Mapping & Intelligence Platform. This platform offers integrated analytics to aid the healthcare sector. GVR, a prominent global market intelligence and strategic consulting firm, unveiled this development to assist in navigating the industry. The platform aims to provide valuable insights and strategic guidance.

data.title: SmartRecruiters invests $1 million in second chances for justice-impacted individuals with Defy Ventures
data.description: Defy Ventures, a nonprofit organization based in Los Angeles, announced on March 31, 2026, that they have recently been granted $1 million in unrestricted funds. The organization's mission is to reduce recidivism rates by 50% by utilizing entrepreneurship to provide economic opportunities and bring positive changes to the lives of individuals who are currently or were formerly incarcerated.

data.title: doTERRA Unveils Bold Vision for the Future of Wellness at San Diego Leadership Retreat
data.description: In Pleasant Grove, Utah, on March 31, 2026, doTERRA, a prominent essential oil and wellness enterprise, wrapped up a successful three-day Leadership Retreat in San Diego, California. The gathering united thousands of the firm's top Wellness Advocates, showcasing its influential position in the industry.

data.title: Treeline Raises $25 Million to Reinvent IT Services
data.description: San Francisco-based Treeline has secured $25 million in Series A funding led by Andreessen Horowitz. The funding will assist Treeline in revamping its IT, security, and compliance infrastructures to align with a software- and AI-centric operating model. This investment marks a significant step for Treeline as it progresses towards enhancing its technology offerings.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: The Ademi Firm investigates whether Apellis Pharmaceuticals Inc. is obtaining a Fair Price for Public Shareholders
data.description: In Milwaukee on March 31, 2026, Ademi LLP has launched an investigation into Apellis (NASDAQ: APLS) regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duty and legal violations related to its recent deal with Biogen. Those interested in participating in the investigation and accessing further information can visit the website provided.

data.title: Bernstein Private Wealth Management Appoints Kim Mustin to Lead Fast-Growing Business Owner Segment
data.description: The firm is demonstrating a stronger commitment to entrepreneurial clients by expanding its leadership role. Business owners make up 75% of Bernstein's wealth advisors. The firm's new business growth is rapidly increasing, with a first quarter 2026 run rate exceeding 30% of the total for 2025. This comes as a strategic move to enhance services for entrepreneurial clients. The firm is based in New York and the update was announced on March 31, 2026.

data.title: NRGene Canada Launches MaxBites™ Premium Pet Treat, Entering the Fast-Growing North American Pet Nutrition Market
data.description: A company in Saskatoon, SK, NRGene Canada, has introduced MaxBites™ on March 31, 2026. This all-natural pet treat is made from 100% dried Black Soldier Fly (BSF). It leverages the company's proprietary high-nutrition BSF production. The launch presents a premium pet treat option for consumers looking for natural alternatives, tapping into the benefits of BSF for pet health.
